auth-authheader.name: AuthHeader

stories.name: Login
stories.snippet: const Login = () => <AuthHeader heading="Welcome back!" emailPrompt="or sign in with your email" />;

stories.name: Register
stories.snippet: const Register = () => <AuthHeader heading="Create your Account" emailPrompt="or sign up with your email" />;

auth-authheader.import:
import { AuthHeader } from "vendor";
import { View } from "react-native";

auth-authheading.name: AuthHeading

stories.name: Default
stories.snippet: const Default = () => <AuthHeading label="Verify Your Email Address" />;

stories.name: Centered
stories.snippet: const Centered = () => <AuthHeading label="Recover your password" className="text-center" />;

auth-authheading.import:
import { AuthHeading } from "vendor";
import { View } from "react-native";

stories.name: Countdown
stories.snippet: const Countdown = () => <ResendCodeButton seconds={42} isRunning handleResendCode={async () => undefined} />;

stories.name: Ready To Resend
stories.snippet: const ReadyToResend = () => <ResendCodeButton seconds={0} isRunning={false} handleResendCode={async () => undefined} />;

shared-errortext.name: ErrorText

stories.name: Visible
stories.snippet: const Visible = () => <ErrorText isShown label="Something went wrong. Please try again." />;

stories.name: Hidden
stories.snippet: const Hidden = () => <ErrorText isShown={false} label="This should not render" />;

shared-errortext.import:
import { ErrorText } from "vendor";
import { View } from "react-native";

shared-submitbutton.name: SubmitButton

stories.name: Idle
stories.snippet: const Idle = () => <SubmitButton label="Sign in" loading={false} onPress={fn()} />;

stories.name: Loading
stories.snippet: const Loading = () => <SubmitButton label="Sign in" loading onPress={fn()} />;

stories.name: Disabled
stories.snippet: const Disabled = () => <SubmitButton label="Continue" loading={false} onPress={fn()} isDisabled />;

shared-submitbutton.import:
import { SubmitButton } from "vendor";
import { View } from "react-native";
